title: Mirrored column automation

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi forum,

This is my first time here, but i recently been having some troubles with monday.com
Let’s start by this problem;

I have a board in which there is a “connected board” column. This connected board column has some mirrored columns attached to it. From which there is one “status” column.
I really would like to use this status column as a trigger for automations. But every time i start an automation and do the simple; When STATUS changes to SOMETHING → THEN DO THIS, it doesn’t show the option for mirrored columns.

The problem is that the status i want to use does not appear (which is probably because it’s a mirrored column). Is there a work around? Or is this a function that simply doesn’t exist in Monday.com?

Pleasseee help. I have send several feedback messages to Monday.com to add this function but haven’t heard anything yet.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mostra,

There are a limited number of stock automations that will support mirror columns, mirror columns also cannot be used with custom automations. The list is as follows:

  • When status changes from something to something else, notify someone
  • When status changes to something start time tracking
  • When status changes to something, stop time tracking
  • When status changes to something, set due date to current date plus some days
  • When status changes to something, set due date to current date
  • When status changes to something, start time tracking. When it changes to something stop
  • When status changes to something, create an item in board
  • When status changes to something, change another status to something (Note: mirrored status supported as trigger. Supports mirror columns of subitems)

There could be more available at this time, but this is the most up to date list that I am aware of.

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Shaul_Klarman (Shaul Klarman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!
Try using Autoboost

What you can do is take that mirrored status and put it into a normal status coulmn and then use the automation on that normal status column. Let me know if you need any help with that.

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml: This seems like a good option, i have downloaded Autoboost, how would i set up this command?

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml: No clue what formula i have to put in

posts.author: Shaul_Klarman (Shaul Klarman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey hey,
If you would like, i can give you some hands on help.
Lets set up a short call and ill try to help.

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml:
I figured it out thanks Shaul for the autoboost tip. Works pretty good! I just set the mirrored status column to a normal status column using; when COLUMN1 change, apply a formula and set result to COLUMN2.
All i had to do was, click the auto populate field in the “formula” spot.
Thanks Shaul!

posts.author: Shaul_Klarman (Shaul Klarman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nice!
Let me know if you need any help,
Best,

posts.author: Cherryl_JetPack (Cherryl @ Jetpack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Did you know that VLOOKUP app can help you link your mirrored status column to a regular status column on the same board or even across multiple boards?
And the best part is you can then use Automation on the new status column!

Here’s a step-by-step tutorial on how to use automation on a mirrored column using VLOOKUP.

If you need any assistance with VLOOKUP, don’t hesitate to contact our dedicated support team at appsupport@jetpackapps.co. Our team is always happy to help you with any queries or concerns.

Regards,
Cherryl

posts.author: NancyS (Nancy A Stickle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - I’ve spent a few hours trying to get this recipe to work, but it doesn’t. Does it only work with certain column types? I tried it with a mirror column that is a person and also a status and then the result column is a status. Nothing. If the result column is a status, do you need to have that prepopulated with options?

posts.author: NancyS (Nancy A Stickle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - I don’t see any of these recipes working with mirror columns. Can you tell me where these are located?

posts.author: NancyS (Nancy A Stickle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - by “auto-populate” field, do you mean you picked the field in the list of options in the formula box?

posts.author: Inbar_Boost (Inbar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @NancyS! Inbar from the Autoboost team here

Is this mirror status column connected to one board or more?
Currently, Autoboost only supports copying mirror columns connected to a single board.

posts.author: keijzers (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

i really need this automation to work too. When i install Autoboost and select the ‘When mirror column changes, apply a formula and set the result to column’…

I can’t select any mirror columns. why is this? please help

i have only connect 1 board with another, no other connections

posts.author: cabanasr (Ruben Cabanas)
posts.cookedHtml: It do not support mirror columns as trigger.

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’re open to using third-party apps, you can try Column to Column. This app allows you to use a mirror column as an action trigger:

image334×258 8.62 KB

We already provide recipes for copying values between columns when the mirror column changes, but we can add other to suit your specific use case.
